---
title: "sefnc_baseline_v4"
subtitle: "`sefnc_baseline_v4`"
description: "sefnc_baseline_v4"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/sefnc_baseline_v4/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                      | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                |
|---------------------------|------------------------------|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                   | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                         |
| `center`                  | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                      |
| `sefnc_when_tired`        | sefnc_when_tired             | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling tired. Self-reported by participant. Baseline (V4).                                                          |
| `sefnc_during_crisis`     | sefnc_during_crisis          | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet during or after a personal crisis. Baseline (V4).                                                                         |
| `sefnc_when_depressed`    | sefnc_when_depressed         | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling depressed. Self-reported by participant. Baseline (V4).                                                      |
| `sefnc_when_anxious`      | sefnc_when_anxious           | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling anxious. Self-reported by participant. Baseline (V4).                                                        |
| `sefnc_on_vacation`       | sefnc_on_vacation            | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet while on vacation. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).               |
| `sefnc_when_busy`         | sefnc_when_busy              | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when they have a heavy workload. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `sefnc_when_missed_goals` | sefnc_when_missed_goals      | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when they have not met their dietary goals. Self-reported by participant. Baseline (V4).                                  |
| `sefnc_no_support`        | sefnc_no_support             | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when lacking support from family or friends. Baseline (V4).                                                               |
| `sefnc_busy_schedule`     | sefnc_busy_schedule          | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when their schedule is busy or resource- and/or time-demanding. Self-reported by participant. Baseline (V4).              |

: Fields in the `sefnc_baseline_v4` resource.
